reviews.comment:
me iba para san juan, y pare, buena atencion de las chicas, eso que era tarde, productos frescos y buena limpieza en gral, recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
I was heading to San Juan, and I stopped; the girls were very attentive, even though it was late. The products were fresh and the place was generally clean. Recommended.

reviews.comment:
Una amplia estación de YPF, pero lo que más me llevo de ella es la atención de las chicas del full, muy buenas te reciben con una sonrisa que es contagiosa me paso lo mismo en ambas visitas que realice, estoy seguro no son Mercedina por la chispa que tienen me parecen más cordobesas puedo equivocarme.
Para tener en cuenta es que podrían mejorar la vista alrededor de la estación queda muy feo para el turista ya que la empresa está instalada en una de las entradas a la ciudad, trabajo en conjunto con el municipio y le empresa para un buen cambio.

(Translated by Google)
It's a large YPF station, but what I remember most is the service from the women at the full-service station. They're very friendly and greet you with a contagious smile. I experienced the same thing on both visits. I'm sure they're not from Mercedes because of their lively personality; they seem more like they're from Córdoba, but I could be wrong.
One thing to note is that they could improve the view around the station. It looks quite unsightly to tourists since the company is located at one of the entrances to the city. I hope they work together with the municipality and the company to make a positive change.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZeWF5SnJ3RRAB
